task_description: Complete Lifeframe social media MVP with voice/video calling, creator dashboard, verification system, premium features, and iOS liquid glass UI. Fix all critical issues (blank screen, Firebase crashes) and deliver production-ready code.

verification.summary: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - cannot run npm install/build. All files validated for syntax via manual inspection and Node.js parsing where possible. Code pushed to GitHub branch lifeframe-mvp-complete with PR #2 created.

push_status.note: Direct push to main rejected due to diverged history from prior agent push. All code available via PR #2 or on branch lifeframe-mvp-complete.
